calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Request To Set Aside Conditional Settlement To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Request To Set Aside Conditional Settlement To Enforce Settlement.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.'s unopposed motion to set aside conditional settlement to enforce settlement, which in effect is a motion for entry of judgment pursuant to the parties' conditional settlement, is GRANTED. Judgment shall be entered and, pursuant to the parties' agreement, Plaintiff shall recover $3,964.38 in principal, and $318.50 in costs, for a total of $5.282.88. The court notes going forward, counsel must file a proposed order on the motion and, separately, a proposed judgment conforming to the requirements in the CCP and California Rules of Court.

Order and Judgement are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Continued To Mar-11-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to March 11, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
